description: Tools for searching, checking availability, and booking hotels in Cambodia. The Vibe Booking AI agent uses these tools to help users find and book accommodations.

tools.name: list_hotels
tools.description: Search and filter hotels available in Cambodia. Use this tool when the user wants to browse hotels, asks about accommodation options, or provides preferences like location, price range, star rating, or amenities. Returns a paginated list of hotel summaries with pricing.

location.description: City or province in Cambodia (e.g., 'Siem Reap', 'Phnom Penh')

min_price.description: Minimum price per night in USD

max_price.description: Maximum price per night in USD

tools.returns: Paginated list of hotels with id, slug, name, location, star_rating, price_per_night_from, amenities, rating_average

tools.name: get_hotel_detail
tools.description: Get full details of a specific hotel by its slug, including room types, gallery, policies, check-in/check-out times, and cancellation policy. Use this when the user selects a hotel or wants more information about a specific property.
tools.returns: Full hotel details including rooms array with id, name, max_occupancy, price_per_night_usd, amenities

tools.name: check_hotel_room_availability
tools.description: Check real-time availability and total price for a specific hotel room for a given date range and guest count. Always use this before creating a booking to confirm availability and get the exact price.
tools.returns: is_available (boolean), price_total_usd, nights count, per-night availability breakdown

tools.name: create_hotel_booking
tools.description: Create a hotel room booking with a 15-minute hold. Use this after confirming availability and getting user consent. The booking enters HOLD status until payment is completed. Requires user authentication.
tools.returns: Booking object with id, reference, status (HOLD), total_price_usd, hold_expires_at

tools.name: get_hotel_booking
tools.description: Retrieve details of an existing hotel booking including status, dates, pricing, and hold expiry. Use this to check on a booking's current state or answer user questions about their reservation.
tools.returns: Full booking details with status (HOLD | PENDING_PAYMENT | CONFIRMED | CANCELLED | EXPIRED)

tools.name: cancel_hotel_booking
tools.description: Cancel a hotel booking. Refund amount depends on the hotel's cancellation policy and how close to check-in the cancellation occurs. Use when the user explicitly requests cancellation.
